name: Tsukuba Seiko Co., Ltd.
summary: TSUKUBASEIKO Co,.Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of electrostatic clamping systems. The company offers thin hand, cordless holder, thin wafer supporter, wafer hand, electrostatic belt, and soft palm products. Its products are used in liquid crystal panel, organic EL, touch panel, semiconductor wafer, solar cell wafer, HDD, fuel cell, printed circuit board, and printing machine industries. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Kawachi-gun, Japan.
